chive-sidebar-nav: Label at the top of the left sidebar.
chive-sidebar-collapse: Tooltip/aria-label for the sidebar toggle when sidebar is open (click will collapse it).
chive-sidebar-expand: Tooltip/aria-label for the sidebar toggle when sidebar is collapsed (click will expand it).
chive-section-upload: Heading for the file upload section in the sidebar.
chive-upload-main: Main text inside the drag-and-drop upload zone.
chive-upload-sub: Secondary text inside the upload zone. May contain basic HTML (br, strong).
chive-upload-loaded-main: Upload zone main text after files have been loaded.
chive-upload-loaded-sub: Upload zone secondary text after files have been loaded.
chive-section-files: Heading for the loaded files list section.
chive-no-files: Placeholder shown when no files are loaded.
chive-files-loaded: Summary of how many files are loaded. $1 = count. Uses PLURAL.
chive-files-search-placeholder: Placeholder and aria-label for the text input used to filter loaded files by name.
chive-files-filter-status: Status text shown near file filter input. $1 = number of files matching current filter, $2 = total loaded files.
chive-files-no-match: Message shown inside files list when no loaded file matches current search query.
chive-files-show-more: Button label shown below files list when there are hidden filtered files. $1 = number of hidden files not currently displayed.
chive-files-show-less: Button label shown below files list to collapse back to first page of results.
chive-file-meta: Metadata line for one file. $1 = row count, $2 = column count, $3 = file size.
chive-remove-file: Aria-label for the remove button. $1 = file name.
chive-btn-join-files: Button label in file sidebar that opens the join builder for loaded files.
chive-btn-preset-datasets: Button label in file sidebar that opens the sample datasets dialog.
chive-join-dialog-title: Title of the modal/dialog where user configures a file join.
chive-join-left-file: Label for select control choosing the left/base file in join operation.
chive-join-right-file: Label for select control choosing the right/secondary file in join operation.
chive-join-type: Label for select control choosing join type.
chive-join-type-inner: Option label for inner join (matched keys only).
chive-join-type-left: Option label for left join (all rows from left + matches from right).
chive-join-type-right: Option label for right join (all rows from right + matches from left).
chive-join-type-full: Option label for full outer join (all rows from both sides).
chive-join-left-keys: Label above checkbox list for key columns selected from the left file.
chive-join-right-keys: Label above checkbox list for key columns selected from the right file.
chive-join-left-columns: Label above checkbox list for output columns selected from the left file.
chive-join-right-columns: Label above checkbox list for output columns selected from the right file.
chive-join-cancel: Cancel button label in join builder dialog.
chive-join-create: Primary action button label that creates the joined dataset.
chive-join-error-min-files: Error shown when user tries to open/create a join with fewer than two loaded files.
chive-join-error-invalid-file-selection: Error shown when left/right selected files are invalid or unavailable.
chive-join-error-select-different-files: Error shown when user selected the same file on both join sides.
chive-join-error-keys-required: Error shown when no key columns are selected on one or both sides.
chive-join-error-key-count-mismatch: Error shown when number of selected left keys differs from selected right keys.
chive-join-error-columns-required: Error shown when no output columns were selected at all.
chive-join-error-generic: Generic fallback error when join dataset creation fails.
chive-join-name-prefix: Prefix used in auto-generated joined dataset file names.
chive-join-generated-size: Metadata text used as pseudo-size for generated join datasets. $1 = resulting row count.
chive-join-success: Feedback message shown after creating joined dataset. $1 = new dataset name.
chive-join-estimate-empty: Hint shown in join dialog estimate area before valid key-column selections are made.
chive-join-estimate-rows: Live estimate shown in join dialog. $1 = estimated resulting row count.
chive-preset-dialog-title: Title of the sample datasets selection dialog.
chive-preset-load: Primary button label in sample datasets dialog that confirms loading selected dataset.
chive-preset-cancel: Cancel button label in sample datasets dialog.
chive-preset-load-success: Feedback shown after loading a sample dataset. $1 = localized dataset name.
chive-preset-generated-size: Pseudo-size label used for generated sample datasets in file list metadata. $1 = row count.
chive-preset-card-meta: Metadata line in each sample dataset card. $1 = row count, $2 = column count.
chive-preset-source-label: Label prefix displayed before source information in each sample dataset card.
chive-preset-iris-name: Display name for Iris sample dataset preset.
chive-preset-iris-desc: Short description for Iris sample dataset card in modal.
chive-preset-amazonian-trees-name: Display name for Amazonian Trees sample dataset preset.
chive-preset-amazonian-trees-desc: Short description for Amazonian Trees sample dataset card in modal.
chive-preset-amazon-multilevel-nesting-n: Display name for Amazon Multi-level Nesting sample dataset preset.
chive-preset-amazon-multilevel-nesting-d: Short description for Amazon Multi-level Nesting dataset card in modal, highlighting hierarchy columns and suitability for deep bubble nesting tests.
chive-section-columns: Heading for the column selection section.
chive-section-viz-manage: Heading for the sidebar section where user enables/disables charts and edits chart parameters.
chive-action-only-numeric: Quick-action button: select only numeric columns.
chive-action-only-text: Quick-action button: select only text columns.
chive-btn-advance: Primary sidebar button that opens visualization-management sidebar mode. Include the → glyph.
chive-btn-edit-columns: Button in visualization-management sidebar mode that returns to the column-selection sidebar mode.
chive-btn-go-panel: Button in visualization-management sidebar mode that switches to the panel tab/sidebar mode.
chive-empty-title: Heading in the main area when no file is loaded.
chive-card-preview: Title of the data preview card.
chive-tab-preview: Tab label that switches the main result area to the preview/statistics view.
chive-tab-charts: Tab label that switches the main result area to the chart visualizations view.
chive-tab-panel: Tab label that switches the main result area to the panel composer view.
chive-badge-preview: Badge in the preview card. $1 = total rows, $2 = rows shown, $3 = visible columns, $4 = total columns.
chive-no-columns-selected: Message inside the preview area when no columns are selected.
chive-card-cat-stats: Title of the categorical-columns statistics card (mode, missing, unique, top-5 concentration).
chive-card-charts: Title of the chart visualization card.
chive-charts-badge: Badge in chart card header. $1 = count of currently visible columns, $2 = count of visible numeric columns.
chive-chart-bar-title: Heading for the bar chart block.
chive-chart-scatter-title: Heading for the scatter plot block.
chive-chart-network-title: Heading for the network graph block.
chive-chart-pie-title: Heading for the pie/donut chart block.
chive-chart-bubble-title: Heading for the bubble chart block.
chive-chart-control-axis-label-x: Label for checkbox control that toggles visibility of the X-axis label text for charts that support axes.
chive-chart-control-axis-label-y: Label for checkbox control that toggles visibility of the Y-axis label text for charts that support axes.
chive-chart-control-common-title: Label for text input control where users define a custom chart title rendered inside the SVG and reused in panel snapshots.
chive-chart-control-common-height: Label for slider control that sets chart rendering height in the visualizations tab.
chive-chart-control-bar-category: Label for the select control that chooses which column is used as bar-chart category.
chive-chart-control-bar-sort: Label for the select control that chooses bar-chart sorting mode.
chive-chart-control-bar-topn: Label for the select control that sets the category limit (top N) for the bar chart.
chive-chart-control-bar-measure: Label for the select control that chooses whether bars represent row count, numeric sum, or numeric mean.
chive-chart-control-bar-measure-count: Option label for bar measure mode that counts rows per category.
chive-chart-control-bar-measure-sum: Option label for bar measure mode that sums a selected numeric column per category.
chive-chart-control-bar-measure-mean: Option label for bar measure mode that averages a selected numeric column per category.
chive-chart-control-bar-value-column: Label for the select control that picks the numeric column used when bar measure mode is sum or mean.
chive-chart-control-bar-color: Label for the color picker control that customizes bar chart fill color.
chive-chart-sort-count-desc: Sort option label: by count, descending.
chive-chart-sort-count-asc: Sort option label: by count, ascending.
chive-chart-sort-label-asc: Sort option label: by category label/name, ascending.
chive-chart-sort-label-desc: Sort option label: by category label/name, descending.
chive-chart-topn-all: Select option label for 'show all categories' in bar chart top-N control.
chive-chart-control-scatter-x: Label for the select control that chooses the X-axis column for scatter plot.
chive-chart-control-scatter-y: Label for the select control that chooses the Y-axis column for scatter plot.
chive-chart-control-scatter-xscale: Label for the select control that chooses linear/log scale for scatter X axis.
chive-chart-control-scatter-yscale: Label for the select control that chooses linear/log scale for scatter Y axis.
chive-chart-control-scatter-categorical-: Label for the select control that chooses how repeated categorical X/Y pairs are displayed in scatter plot.
Option label for showing repeated categorical pairs as jittered points.
Option label for aggregating repeated categorical pairs into one point with radius scaled by row count.
chive-chart-scale-linear: Option label for linear axis scale.
chive-chart-scale-log: Option label for logarithmic axis scale.
chive-chart-control-scatter-radius: Label for the select control that sets scatter plot point size.
chive-chart-control-scatter-opacity: Label for the select control that sets scatter plot point opacity.
chive-chart-control-scatter-color: Label for the color picker control that customizes scatter plot point color.
chive-chart-control-network-source: Label for select control that chooses source-node column for network graph links.
chive-chart-control-network-target: Label for select control that chooses target-node column for network graph links.
chive-chart-control-network-weight: Label for optional numeric select control used as link weight in network graph.
chive-chart-control-network-group: Label for optional select control used to color/group network nodes.
chive-chart-control-network-node-radius: Label for slider control that sets network node circle radius.
chive-chart-control-network-link-distanc: Label for slider control that sets preferred distance between linked nodes.
chive-chart-control-network-charge: Label for slider control that sets network force-charge strength.
chive-chart-control-network-link-opacity: Label for slider control that sets network link stroke opacity.
chive-chart-control-network-zoom: Label for slider control that sets initial network zoom scale.
chive-chart-control-network-reset-zoom: Label for button that resets network zoom scale to default.
chive-chart-control-network-alpha-decay: Label for slider control that sets simulation cooling speed (alpha decay) for network layout stabilization.
chive-chart-control-network-show-legend: Label for checkbox control that toggles the network group legend.
chive-chart-control-network-node-labels: Label for checkbox control that toggles text labels next to network nodes.
chive-chart-control-pie-category: Label for the select control that chooses which column is used as category in pie/donut chart.
chive-chart-control-pie-measure: Label for the select control that chooses whether pie sectors are based on row count or sum of numeric values.
chive-chart-control-pie-measure-count: Option label for pie measure mode that counts rows per category.
chive-chart-control-pie-measure-sum: Option label for pie measure mode that sums a selected numeric column per category.
chive-chart-control-pie-value-column: Label for the select control that picks the numeric column used when pie measure mode is set to sum.
chive-chart-control-pie-inner-radius: Label for the slider control that sets pie/donut inner radius (0 behaves like pie).
chive-chart-control-pie-outer-radius: Label for the slider control that sets pie/donut outer radius.
chive-chart-control-pie-pad-angle: Label for the slider control that defines angular spacing between sectors in the pie/donut chart.
chive-chart-control-pie-zoom: Label for slider control that sets initial pie/donut zoom scale.
chive-chart-control-pie-reset-zoom: Label for button that resets pie/donut zoom scale to default.
chive-chart-control-pie-color: Label for the color picker control that sets pie/donut base color.
chive-chart-control-pie-sector-label: Label for checkbox control that toggles display of each sector category/name text.
chive-chart-control-pie-sector-value: Label for checkbox control that toggles display of each sector numeric value text.
chive-chart-control-pie-show-legend: Label for checkbox control that toggles pie/donut legend visibility.
chive-chart-control-pie-label-position: Label for the select control that chooses whether pie labels are drawn inside sectors or outside with connector lines.
chive-chart-control-pie-label-position-i: Option label for pie label placement inside sectors.
chive-chart-control-pie-label-position-o: Option label for pie label placement outside sectors with leader lines.
chive-chart-control-pie-topn: Label for the select control that limits the number of pie/donut categories (Top N).
chive-chart-control-pie-topn-mode: Label for the select control that chooses how to handle categories beyond Top N (group as Other vs truncate).
chive-chart-pie-topn-mode-other: Option label: aggregate the categories beyond Top N into a single 'Other' slice.
chive-chart-pie-topn-mode-truncate: Option label: drop the categories beyond Top N entirely, showing only the top ones.
chive-chart-pie-other: Label used for the aggregated 'Other' slice when Top N grouping is active.
chive-chart-control-bubble-category: Label for the select control that chooses which column is used as the bubble chart category.
chive-chart-control-bubble-measure: Label for the select control that chooses whether bubble size represents row count, numeric sum, or numeric mean.
chive-chart-control-bubble-measure-count: Option label for bubble measure mode that counts rows per category.
chive-chart-control-bubble-measure-sum: Option label for bubble measure mode that sums a selected numeric column per category.
chive-chart-control-bubble-measure-mean: Option label for bubble measure mode that averages a selected numeric column per category.
chive-chart-control-bubble-value-column: Label for the select control that picks the numeric column used when bubble measure mode is sum or mean.
chive-chart-control-bubble-group: Label for the optional select control used to color bubbles by group column.
chive-chart-control-bubble-topn: Label for the select control that sets the category limit (top N) for the bubble chart.
chive-chart-control-bubble-label-mode: Label for the select control that chooses how bubble labels are displayed.
chive-chart-control-bubble-label-mode-al: Option label for bubble labels shown on all circles.
chive-chart-control-bubble-label-mode-ho: Option label for bubble labels hidden until hover.
chive-chart-control-bubble-label-mode-au: Option label for bubble labels shown automatically only on larger circles.
chive-chart-control-bubble-nesting-mode: Label for select control that chooses between flat and grouped nesting modes in bubble chart.
chive-chart-control-bubble-nesting-flat: Option label for flat nesting mode where all bubbles are at the same level.
chive-chart-control-bubble-nesting-group: Option label for grouped nesting mode where bubbles are nested inside parent group circles.
chive-chart-control-bubble-group-color: Label for group column control when nesting mode is flat (used for coloring only).
chive-chart-control-bubble-group-parent: Label for group column control when nesting mode is grouped (defines parent circles).
chive-chart-control-bubble-children-coun: Tooltip label for the number of child bubbles inside a parent group circle.
chive-chart-empty-bubble-group-required: Message shown when bubble chart is in grouped nesting mode but no group column is selected.
chive-chart-control-bubble-padding: Label for the slider control that sets padding between packed bubbles.
chive-chart-bubble-zoom-hint: Hint text shown on grouped bubble chart indicating the user can double-click a parent group to zoom in.
chive-chart-bubble-zoom-back: Hint text shown while zoomed into a bubble group indicating the user can click the background to zoom out.
chive-chart-bubble-zoom-back-one-level: Hint text shown while zoomed in, indicating background click navigates one level up.
chive-chart-control-bubble-nesting-level: Label for each progressive nesting column selector. Parameter $1 is the 1-based level index.
chive-chart-control-bubble-nesting-add-l: Button text to add another nesting level selector in bubble controls.
chive-chart-control-bubble-nesting-remov: Button text to remove the last nesting level selector in bubble controls.
chive-chart-control-bubble-nesting-empty: Placeholder option for empty nesting level selector.
chive-chart-control-bubble-nesting-colum: Section label for bubble nesting column selectors.
chive-chart-control-bubble-node-children: Tooltip label for number of child nodes under an intermediate packed circle.
chive-chart-control-bubble-node-depth: Tooltip label for hierarchy depth level of a packed node.
chive-chart-empty-bubble-nesting-require: Empty-state message when grouped mode is selected but no nesting columns are configured.
chive-chart-toggle-bar: Label for checkbox/toggle that enables or disables bar chart rendering.
chive-chart-toggle-scatter: Label for checkbox/toggle that enables or disables scatter plot rendering.
chive-chart-toggle-network: Label for checkbox/toggle that enables or disables network graph rendering.
chive-chart-toggle-pie: Label for checkbox/toggle that enables or disables pie/donut chart rendering.
chive-chart-toggle-bubble: Label for checkbox/toggle that enables or disables bubble chart rendering.
chive-viz-bar-desc: Short helper description shown in the bar chart visualization card.
chive-viz-scatter-desc: Short helper description shown in the scatter plot visualization card. Scatter now supports numeric and categorical axes.
chive-viz-network-desc: Short helper description shown in the network graph visualization card.
chive-viz-pie-desc: Short helper description shown in the pie/donut visualization card.
chive-viz-category-comparison: Small category badge label shown on visualization cards for comparison-style charts.
chive-viz-category-relationship: Small category badge label shown on visualization cards for relationship-style charts.
chive-viz-category-composition: Small category badge label shown on visualization cards for composition-style charts.
chive-viz-category-hierarchy: Small category badge label shown on visualization cards for hierarchy-style charts.
chive-viz-toggle-expand: Button label to expand a visualization card parameters section.
chive-viz-toggle-collapse: Button label to collapse a visualization card parameters section.
chive-chart-sidebar-empty: Message shown in visualization-management sidebar when there are no selected columns available.
chive-chart-option-none: Placeholder option text for chart selectors when nothing is selected.
chive-chart-empty-bar: Message shown when bar chart cannot be rendered due to missing suitable visible columns.
chive-chart-empty-bar-numeric: Message shown when bar chart is in sum/mean mode but no valid numeric value column is selected.
chive-chart-empty-scatter: Message shown when scatter chart cannot be rendered due to missing visible columns for both axes.
chive-chart-empty-scatter-log: Message shown when scatter chart uses log scale on numeric axes and there are not enough positive values to plot.
chive-chart-empty-network: Message shown when network graph cannot be rendered due to missing/invalid source-target columns.
chive-chart-empty-pie: Message shown when pie/donut chart cannot be rendered due to missing suitable visible categorical column.
chive-chart-empty-pie-sum: Message shown when pie/donut chart is in sum mode but no suitable visible numeric value column is selected.
chive-chart-empty-bubble: Message shown when bubble chart cannot be rendered due to missing suitable visible categorical column.
chive-chart-empty-bubble-numeric: Message shown when bubble chart is in sum/mean mode but no suitable visible numeric value column is selected.
chive-chart-empty-none: Message shown in visualization tab when user disabled all charts.
chive-chart-disabled: Message shown in a chart slot when that chart was disabled from sidebar.
chive-chart-no-data: Message shown when a chart has no plottable rows after data cleaning/filtering.
chive-chart-action-download-svg: Button label to download the rendered chart as an SVG file (in the chart header action row).
chive-chart-action-add-panel: Button label to add the rendered chart to the panel/dashboard (in the chart header action row).
chive-chart-action-add-panel-coming-soon: Temporary message shown when user clicks add-to-panel while feature is not implemented yet.
chive-chart-download-error: Error shown when SVG download fails because no chart SVG is available.
chive-section-panel-saved: Heading for the sidebar section listing charts saved to the panel.
chive-panel-sidebar-hint: Short helper text in panel sidebar explaining drag-and-drop from sidebar to slots.
chive-btn-back-viz: Button in panel sidebar that returns user to visualizations tab/sidebar.
chive-card-panel: Title of the panel composition card.
chive-panel-layout-label: Label for the panel layout selector.
chive-panel-borders-label: Label for checkbox that toggles stronger slot borders in panel canvas.
chive-panel-borders-color-label: Label for the color input that customizes slot border color.
chive-panel-layout-single: Option label for one-slot panel layout.
chive-panel-layout-2col: Option label for two-column panel layout.
chive-panel-layout-hero2: Option label for layout with one large slot and two smaller slots.
chive-panel-layout-3col: Option label for layout with three equal-width columns.
chive-panel-layout-1x2: Option label for layout with one slot above another.
chive-panel-export-svg: Button label to export the currently composed panel layout as SVG.
chive-panel-add-block: Button label that appends a new panel block to the canvas stack.
chive-panel-max-blocks: Error shown when user tries to add more than the maximum allowed blocks.
chive-panel-resize-handle: Aria-label for the guided drag handle used to resize panel block regions.
chive-panel-resize-block-height: Aria-label for the drag handle used to resize a full panel block height.
chive-panel-slot-empty: Placeholder text shown inside an empty panel slot.
chive-panel-clear-slot: Aria-label for button that clears one slot assignment.
chive-panel-remove-chart: Aria-label for button that removes one saved chart from panel sidebar.
chive-panel-remove-chart-short: Visible label for sidebar action button that removes one saved chart snapshot.
chive-panel-empty-sidebar: Empty-state message when no charts have been added to panel sidebar yet.
chive-panel-add-error: Error shown when adding a chart snapshot to panel fails.
chive-panel-add-success: Success toast shown when a chart snapshot is added to panel.
chive-panel-export-error: Error shown when exporting current panel layout to SVG fails.
chive-tooltip-count: Tooltip label for bar-chart count value.
chive-tooltip-sum: Tooltip label for bar-chart sum value.
chive-tooltip-mean: Tooltip label for bar-chart mean value.
chive-tooltip-percentage: Tooltip label for bar-chart percentage value.
chive-tooltip-row: Tooltip label for scatter point source row index.
chive-stats-badge: Badge in the stats card. $1 = number of numeric columns. Uses PLURAL.
chive-stat-valid: Label for the count of non-null numeric values in a column.
chive-cat-stats-badge: Badge in the categorical stats card. $1 = number of categorical columns. Uses PLURAL.
chive-cat-stat-non-empty: Label for the count of non-empty values in a categorical column.
chive-cat-stat-missing: Label for the count and percentage of missing/empty values.
chive-cat-stat-unique: Label for the count and uniqueness rate of distinct values.
chive-cat-stat-mode: Label for the most frequent value (mode) and its count/percentage.
chive-cat-stat-top5-pct: Label for the percentage of rows covered by the five most frequent values.
chive-cat-stat-empty: Message shown in a categorical stat card when the column is fully empty.
chive-lang-label: Label for the language selector in the header.
chive-type-number: Display label for numeric columns (used in column list tags and table footer). Keep short.
chive-type-text: Display label for text columns (used in column list tags and table footer). Keep short.
chive-warn-large-file: Confirmation warning before parsing a large file. $1 = file name, $2 = current file size (formatted), $3 = recommended max size.
chive-warn-large-rows: Confirmation warning after parsing when row count is large. $1 = file name, $2 = parsed row count (formatted), $3 = recommended max row count (formatted).
chive-error-format: Error when user uploads an unsupported file type. $1 = file name. Lists all accepted extensions.
chive-error-read: Error when the browser fails to read a file. $1 = file name.
chive-error-upload-processing: Fallback error shown when file upload processing fails and no specific message is available.
chive-error-upload-input-missing: Error shown when the hidden file input element is missing from the DOM during setup.
chive-error-upload-zone-missing: Error shown when the upload drop zone element is missing from the DOM during setup.
chive-error-internal: Fallback error message for unexpected internal application failures.
chive-chart-color-palette: Label for quick-apply color palette preset buttons (Pastel, Bold, Colorblind-Safe).
chive-chart-color-palette-help: Help text below palette buttons explaining that Colorblind-Safe is the accessibility-first default.
chive-chart-palette-tableau10: Display name for the Tableau10 palette (the 'Standard' option).
chive-chart-palette-bold: Display name for the Bold palette (the 'Vivid' option).
chive-chart-palette-pastel: Display name for the Pastel palette.
chive-chart-palette-colorblind-safe: Display name for the colorblind-safe palette (accessibility-first default).
chive-chart-color-mode: Label for dropdown selector of color rendering mode (uniform, gradient, per-item, etc).
chive-chart-color-gradient: Option label for automatic gradient coloring (min-to-max value interpolation).
chive-chart-color-gradient-manual: Option label for manual threshold-based gradient color mode.
chive-chart-color-by-field: Option label for coloring by data field/column values.
chive-chart-color-per-item: Option label for individual per-category or per-item custom coloring.
chive-chart-color-gradient-min: Label for color picker for the start/minimum value in gradient.
chive-chart-color-gradient-max: Label for color picker for the end/maximum value in gradient.
chive-chart-color-gradient-distribution: Label for selector that controls how gradient colors are distributed across items: by absolute value or by sort rank.
chive-chart-color-gradient-distribution-: Option label for value-based gradient distribution (linear interpolation between min and max values).
Option label for rank-based gradient distribution (evenly spaced colors across items sorted by value, regardless of magnitude).
chive-chart-color-threshold: Label for threshold settings in manual gradient mode.
chive-chart-color-source-node: Label for color picker for network graph source (origin) nodes.
chive-chart-color-target-node: Label for color picker for network graph target (destination) nodes.
chive-chart-color-edge-by-weight: Label for option to color network edges by link weight (gradient).
chive-chart-color-pie-slices: Label for the per-sector color customization grid in pie chart controls.
chive-chart-color-scatter-field: Label for dropdown to select which column should encode scatter plot point colors.
chive-chart-color-scatter-numeric: Option label for encoding scatter plot colors by numeric field (continuous gradient).
chive-chart-color-scatter-category: Option label for encoding scatter plot colors by category field (discrete palette).
chive-chart-color-scheme: Label for color scheme selector (viridis, plasma, cool, warm, etc).
chive-chart-filter-column: Label for selecting which data column should be used as chart filter.
chive-chart-filter-search: Label for text input that filters the visible categorical options list.
chive-chart-filter-values: Label above checkbox list of categorical values included in chart filter.
chive-chart-filter-select-all: Button label to include all categorical values in current chart filter.
chive-chart-filter-clear: Button label to clear all selected categorical values in current chart filter.
chive-chart-filter-showing: Summary text under categorical filter list. $1 = currently shown options, $2 = total options after search.
chive-chart-filter-more: Hint shown when categorical values are truncated to first N options. $1 = hidden count.
chive-chart-filter-missing: Label used for checkbox representing null/undefined/empty values in categorical filter.
chive-chart-filter-operator: Label for select control choosing numeric filter condition operator.
chive-chart-filter-op-between: Option label for numeric filter condition that keeps values between min and max.
chive-chart-filter-op-lt: Option label for numeric filter condition that keeps values less than target.
chive-chart-filter-op-gt: Option label for numeric filter condition that keeps values greater than target.
chive-chart-filter-op-eq: Option label for numeric filter condition that keeps values equal to target.
chive-chart-filter-min: Label for minimum numeric input used by between operator.
chive-chart-filter-max: Label for maximum numeric input used by between operator.
chive-chart-filter-value: Label for single numeric input used by less-than/greater-than/equal operators.
chive-global-filter-trigger-inactive: Neutral label for global dataset filter trigger when no filter is active.
chive-global-filter-trigger-active: Active-state label for global filter trigger. $1 = number of active rules (uses PLURAL), $2 = filtered row count, $3 = total rows.
chive-global-filter-dialog-title: Title of global dataset filter modal dialog.
chive-global-filter-combine-hint: Hint shown below the modal title explaining that multiple rules are combined with AND.
chive-global-filter-apply: Primary action: save current modal draft filter and close dialog.
chive-global-filter-clear: Secondary action: reset filter to default (no filter) and refresh charts.
chive-global-filter-clear-all: Secondary action inside the modal that removes every rule and applies an empty filter.
chive-global-filter-add-rule: Action button that appends a new empty filter rule to the builder.
chive-global-filter-remove-rule: Action inside a rule card that deletes that specific rule.
chive-global-filter-rule-title: Per-rule title inside each rule card. $1 = 1-based rule index.
chive-global-filter-no-rules: Placeholder shown in the rules container when no rule has been added yet.
chive-global-filter-cancel: Secondary action: discard unsaved edits from this modal session.
chive-global-filter-empty: Placeholder shown inside a rule body when no filter column is selected yet.
